label: NUTM1-fusion transcriptional program
basis: Canonical NUTM1 fusions can activate MYC-driven squamous/stem and CTA programs; PRAME/MAGEA4 are supportive but not diagnostic
caveat: Expression effect is a consistency check or testing prompt, not a NUT carcinoma diagnosis; NUTM1 partner, morphology, and NUT IHC/fusion confirmation remain decisive

label: EWSR1-ETS Ewing transcriptional program
basis: EWSR1-FLI1/ETS fusions drive Ewing transcriptional targets including FATE1, NKX2-2, NR0B1, and chromatin regulators
caveat: RNA-only target activation should prompt Ewing fusion testing in the right context; it cannot distinguish all small round blue cell tumors alone

label: SS18-SSX synovial sarcoma expression program
basis: SS18-SSX synovial sarcoma commonly shows TLE1/BCL2 and proliferative transcriptional programs
caveat: TLE1 and BCL2 are not specific; direct SS18-SSX fusion testing is required

label: PAX3/7-FOXO1 fusion-positive rhabdomyosarcoma program
basis: Fusion-positive alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma often activates ALK/FGFR4/MET and myogenic differentiation markers
caveat: MYOG/MYOD1 support rhabdomyosarcoma lineage; PAX3/7-FOXO1 supports ARMS in the right site/morphology but rare non-RMS sinonasal contexts exist

label: PAX3-rearranged non-FOXO expression program
basis: Non-FOXO PAX3 partners can preserve a PAX3-like developmental/myogenic expression effect, but map to different entities depending on partner and site
caveat: Low-specificity downstream program; use as a consistency check or testing prompt, not an ARMS subtype call

label: ASPSCR1-TFE3 ASPS expression program
basis: ASPSCR1-TFE3 biology is associated with angiogenic/MET programs
caveat: Angiogenic expression is shared by multiple tumor states; direct fusion and pathology are required
